description: A fulfillment of an information bounty — someone with access to a megaproject provides the requested information (photos, webcam links, progress reports, documents).

main.description: A response to an information request, providing the requested data. The fulfiller's PDS stores the evidence. The request creator reviews and marks the request as fulfilled if satisfied.

requestRef.description: AT URI of the com.minomobi.mega.request record being fulfilled

evidence.description: Array of evidence items fulfilling the request

notes.description: Free-text notes from the fulfiller — context, observations, details about what they found

location.description: Optional geotag of where the evidence was captured

capturedAt.description: When the evidence was captured (may differ from createdAt)

createdAt.description: When this fulfillment record was created

blob.description: Uploaded image or video file (stored on fulfiller's PDS)

url.description: External URL (webcam stream, document, satellite imagery link)
